programme.desc: When two Catorce gang members are shot to death, Brenda and her squad must solve the case.

programme.title: The Closer: Manhunt

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jailbait
programme.desc: When a newly released prisoner misses two back-to-back parole meetings, the squad is called in to track him down. Meanwhile, Sharon invites a therapist to the office to evaluate Rusty over a game of chess.

programme.title: Major Crimes: All In
programme.desc: When a body turns up at a posh country club in a quite neighbourhood, the squad's investigation leads them down a money trail full of surprises. Meanwhile, Flynn is noticeably distracted on the job and Rusty questions Emma's intentions.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Curve Ball
programme.desc: Christmas vacation is interrupted for the division when a baseball scout is found dead in his RV. The squad works through the murder case, unfolding a complicated kidnapping scheme.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Risk Assessment
programme.desc: When a well-off graduate student gets shot to death in a gang-riddled neighbourhood, the division must work with the FBI to find his killer.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Year-End Blowout
programme.desc: A year-end-blowout sale becomes literal for a used car lot after one of its owners is killed when a bomb explodes. While the squad tries to find who is responsible, Rusty attempts to catch the person threatening his and Sharon's life.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 1)
programme.desc: During a terrifying three-day period in late August 1990, five college students were found brutally murdered in Gainesville, Florida.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 2)
programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Dartmouth Murders: Evil in a Small Town
programme.desc: Well known and liked Dartmouth College professors Half and Suzanne Zantop’s incredible lives came to a shocking end: found brutally murdered in their home. With few leads and clues investigators were stumped.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: The Secret They Couldn’t Talk About Part 1
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a 28-year-old mother of two, goes missing in December of 2009. The mystery deepens as more details about her marriage to husband Josh and their life behind closed doors emerge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: What the Children Saw Part 2
programme.desc: Authorities search for missing mother of two, Susan Powell, in every nook and cranny of the desert in Western Utah while her friends and family wait for a break in the case.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Dartmouth Murders: Evil in a Small Town
programme.desc: Well known and liked Dartmouth College professors Half and Suzanne Zantop’s incredible lives came to a shocking end: found brutally murdered in their home. With few leads and clues investigators were stumped.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days Comes to OKC
programme.desc: Thirty-two of the fastest racers from around the country gather in OKC for the biggest street race of the year Cash Days. And, with $50,000 on the line, all the racers are prepared to push their cars to the limit to try and win it all.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: A $50,000 Weekend

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Another Brick in the Wall

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Comfortably Numb

programme.title: Street Outlaws: New Rules, New Road
programme.desc: The Daily Driver field is down to 18. With a new set of rules and a new road to race on, competition gets crazy. But only one driver will take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Dawn of America's List

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Book

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Nap Partners

programme.title: Mom: Snickerdoodle and a Nip Slip

programme.title: Mom: My Little Pony and a Demerol Drip

programme.title: Mom: Quaaludes and Crackerjack

programme.title: Mom: Cinderella and a Drunk MacGyver

programme.title: Peppa Pig: The Cycle Ride/ Dens/ Zoe Zebra the Postman's Daughter/ Cuckoo Clock/ Ice Skating
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go for a cycle ride. Peppa and George play in their treehouse. The Postman's daughter helps him do his job. The old cuckoo clock is broken. Peppa and George go ice-skating.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Desert Island/ Going Boating
programme.desc: A fishing trip gone wrong leaves Grandpa Pig and Grampy Rabbit stranded on a desert island. Then, all the families have a race, and Daddy Pig wishes he hadn’t picked a boat that has to be pedalled.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Chinese New Year/ The Panda Twins

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Long Train Journey/ Madame Gazelle's House

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Great Animal Crown

programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Nerds of the Round Table
programme.desc: Ivy attempts to keep his winning streak alive, while Darrell and Rene play mind games with each other. After one ends up at a crime scene and the other takes a trip back in time, things get a little foggy for Jarrod and Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Operation: Intimidation
programme.desc: Brandi is ready to close the Long Beach store, but Jarrod is determined to save it by scoring more lockers. Ivy tries to intimidate other buyers, while Darrell gets the shock treatment.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the King of Montebello
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi split up, and only time will tell if it's for good. Ivy has hired a new employee to run his shop. Darrell's Montebello magic strikes again, and Rene learns the art of stripping.

programme.title: Storage Wars: For a Good Time Call Ivy
programme.desc: Darrell is up to his old tricks again, but it's Ivy who ends up pranking the competition while Rene and Casey space out.

programme.title: Storage Wars: LBC U LTR
programme.desc: Ivy is racing against time to score a locker and get home; otherwise, he'll be in the doghouse. Rene spends the most money of anyone, but it's Darrell and Brandon who paint their way to success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Nuthin' But a 'G' Thang, Rene

programme.desc: Repeat offenders face justice from Judge Caprio in traffic court.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: While towing illegally parked cars in Staten Island, JoJo faces off with a woman accusing him of doing the devil's work.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: In Detroit, Eric amazes with machine-like techniques while ticketing irate parking violators.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Colchester Rapist
programme.desc: A serial rapist stalks and preys on elderly women for nearly two decades.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Atomic Dog
programme.desc: The best minds and technology are brought together to reveal the latest edge of forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: The Eclectic Murders
programme.desc: A killer hides among a group of Goth youths.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: To Catch a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The best minds and technology are brought together to reveal the latest edge of forensics.

programme.title: Intervention: Shandon
programme.desc: After her parents divorced, Shandon was bullied and she turned to drugs to cope. Now in her mid-twenties and saddled with a $200 a day intravenous habit, she prostitutes herself in order to feed her addiction.

programme.title: Intervention: Emily
programme.desc: Emily suffered from depression and low self-esteem and she now weighs less than 90 pounds.

programme.title: Intervention: Ben and Josh
programme.desc: Ben experienced a childhood filled with domestic violence and homelessness and turned to a drug called DXM. Josh is addicted to food and weighs 550 lbs.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Highlights from the High Seas
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Andy Richter
programme.desc: Andy Richter challenges the chefs to recreate the delectable fish and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Charlotte McKinney
programme.desc: The chefs recreate Charlotte McKinney's favorite all-natural burger. They'll have to use their imagination no stick the landing.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Tacos with Guy Episode
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Learn what has become a signature part of Q's wardrobe and who among the Jokers is considered the best dancer. Plus, find out which character made his first appearance on an early episode of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: 50 Shades of Faye

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Client-Hell
programme.desc: Savannah agrees to manage Todd's singing career for a school project and unwittingly unleashes his inner diva. Meanwhile, Chase struggles to throw a dinner for the family to prove he can outdo Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bunions, Bulldogs and Hedgehogs, Oh My!
programme.desc: Todd thinks taking over Julie's housework while she recovers from surgery will be a cakewalk, but running the home isn't as easy as it looks. Chase schemes with Nanny Faye to get Todd to accept his dog, Lilo.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Market Crash
programme.desc: Chase accepts Todd's Challenge to market the juice bar, but quickly realizes that selling juice is hard. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie fret about Savannah, who's convalescing at the family home after a bad car wreck.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mannequin Challenge
programme.desc: Savannah struggles with a project for her clothing line. Chase gets an ultimatum from Todd about getting Lilo's behaviour under control.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: O Grayson, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Todd and Julie's plans for a peaceful weekend go awry. Chase tries to spend some bonding time with Grayson, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Matchmakers and Batchbakers
programme.desc: Todd and Julie try to find Savannah the perfect match when she jumps back into the dating pool. Meanwhile, Grayson enters a baking contest.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dancing Tween
programme.desc: Grayson is invited to his first dance and Todd and Julie are conflicted about him growing up. Meanwhile, Todd puts Savannah's and Nanny Faye's driving skills to the test in Savannah's new ride.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moms Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: When Todd refuses to celebrate anyone but Faye for Mother's Day, Julie and Lindsie make their own plans. Todd is forced to babysit Jackson but struggles with Lindsie's new age parenting.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers
programme.desc: Game Warden McGee rushes to a domestic altercation. Game Wardens Zuniga and Roel run into trespassers, while Provasnik inspects a potentially stolen jet ski. Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up on an investigation, and a baby squirrel is rescued.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A tense confrontation ensues when Wardens Scott and Gould respond to a call about an illegal deer hunting case. A pair of raccoons find their way to a gas station and must be trapped, and Warden Boone handles a disgruntled hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wake of Destruction
programme.desc: Game Wardens Mallory Mitchell and Jeremy Lindsey intervene when an overloaded boat and unruly jet skiers put lives at risk. Game Warden Randolph McGee investigates reports of a wild hog being tortured, while other game wardens round up a willy alligator.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Guns and Meth
programme.desc: During a routine hunting license check, husband and wife Game Wardens Ben and Chelsea Bailey discover illegal drugs. Trespassers get caught in a dangerous restricted area, and Warden James Cummings races to track down a man threatening self-harm.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunter Games
programme.desc: Game Wardens Mike Boone and James Noxon question a felon suspected of illegally hunting with a firearm. Hunters are tracked down and interrogated after a suspicious sighting on private property, and a late-night shrimp boat search uncovers illegal fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Marshland Massacre
programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunter Games
programme.desc: Game Wardens Mike Boone and James Noxon question a felon suspected of illegally hunting with a firearm. Hunters are tracked down and interrogated after a suspicious sighting on private property, and a late-night shrimp boat search uncovers illegal fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Guns and Meth
programme.desc: During a routine hunting license check, husband and wife Game Wardens Ben and Chelsea Bailey discover illegal drugs. Trespassers get caught in a dangerous restricted area, and Warden James Cummings races to track down a man threatening self-harm.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Marshland Massacre
programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppies: Growing Up Fluffy
programme.desc: Catch up with the Dachshund, Portuguese Water Dog and Rhodesian Ridgeback litters a year after they were first introduced. Find out what happened after they left the nest.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Einstein Hates Izzy
programme.desc: Einstein is the perfect cat until he sees Izzy and then goes into full out-to-kill attack mode. Scott and Tiffani need their cat to stop his hell cat behaviour before their baby is born.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Island of Time
programme.desc: Cameras capture the natural behaviour of dolphins at play. Also, gaze upon magnificent tropical fish near the Island of Time, just south of the Great Barrier Reef. Terri films the mating rituals of green water turtles.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: New Arrival
programme.desc: The zoo's Asian elephant family welcome a new arrival. Grumpy matriarch Thi has been pregnant for two years and is reaching the end of her tether. It's Thi's fourth baby and after giving birth to a stillborn, the zoo is keeping a close eye on her.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Backyard Bungalow
programme.desc: Faced with the need to expand their home after their daughter returns from college, a family in Medford, Ore. calls Pete to expand their not-so-empty-nest. Faced with evolving client requests, Pete transforms his design into a multi-faceted guesthouse.

programme.title: Tanked!: Old School vs. New School
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett take a walk on the techy side by building a tank for a state-of-the-art robotic systems company in Massachusetts. Then they meet up with a pinball enthusiast who needs a tank for his game room.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Orleans, Here We Come
programme.desc: It's a whole new world for Tia, her family, the parolees, and most importantly, her pitbulls, when they pack up their lives and moves across country to New Orleans. But the move is only the first of many challenges Tia faces.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Face Off
programme.desc: Tia meets a family of eight looking to adopt a new dog after losing theirs to cancer. Then, a rescue-call takes Tia and her daughter Tania into New Orleans’s infamous ninth war to face off with a snarling, sick dog.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Brileys
programme.desc: Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count. Even after their apprehension, these brothers prove difficult to contain.

programme.title: Dateline: Suspicion in Silver City
programme.desc: The mysterious death of a 23 year-old mother in New Mexico goes unsolved while her family searches for answers.

programme.title: Dateline: The Last Day
programme.desc: When the 19-year-old wife of a Marine vanishes without a trace in the California desert, investigators launch a massive search. They soon uncover a secret love triangle and a mystery with multiple suspects.

programme.title: Dateline: The Last Day
programme.desc: When the 19-year-old wife of a Marine vanishes without a trace in the California desert, investigators launch a massive search. They soon uncover a secret love triangle and a mystery with multiple suspects.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Good & Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at a trash facility, a detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know she will come face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Unusual Suspect
programme.desc: It was in the still of the night when it started. A cold-blooded serial killer, lurking in the woods, peeping through windows and stalking for his next victim. It's a tale that would be hard to believe, if it didn't really happen.

programme.title: Oxygen Investigates: Serial Killers on the Loose
Mark of a Killer: Killer Caller
programme.desc: Twin Cities, MN, police are hunting for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness. No one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Deadly Summer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun. He taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Deadly Design
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores. Police release surveillance footage to the press and ask the public for help to find a duffle bag wielding murderer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Other Zodiac
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs. Police race against time before he can achieve twelve killings to complete the Zodiac.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Smell of Death

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Code of the Parthenon

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Secrets in the Jungle

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower
programme.desc: Archaeologists are finding hard proof of the prehistoric civilization that once thrived in the Amazon, and with the help of cutting-edge technology, these new discoveries reveal how these long-lost people built an advanced society in the hostile jungle.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts are hot on the trail of the perpetrators that caused this civilization to fall.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: American Stonehenge
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious pattern of rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. At the notorious Alcatraz prison, Rob uses state-of-the-art technology in search of rumored escape tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Rocky Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: California's Hidden Doomsday

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Legend of the Nazi Gold

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Secret History of the New World

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover Makes Three

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Don't Know Why He Spared Me
programme.desc: Thirty years on, Sharon Morris still wonders why former boyfriend Tony Fiebiger didn't kill her when he had the chance. There was a time when she felt only love for Tony, but as his sick crimes are revealed, she's grateful she's alive to talk about it.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Complicated Relationship
programme.desc: A beloved mother of four disappears just days after her stepdaughter vanished. Police must investigate to find out if their complicated relationship led to tragedy.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are unthinkable.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster I Married
programme.desc: When Cindy first fell in love with Bobby, she never imagined that she would one day regret not committing murder. But years after she first discovered the horrifying truth, she is still haunted by the night when she decided not to kill him in his sleep.

programme.title: Disappeared: Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: College student Bryce Laspisa is driving to visit his parents, but something mysterious is troubling him. When his car is found crashed and abandoned in a remote California park, investigators and his family try to make sense of Bryce's baffling behavior.

programme.title: Disappeared: Girl Interrupted
programme.desc: Days after recent graduate Jennifer Kesse goes missing, her car is found abandoned near her home. Police search miles of terrain and interrogate dozens of suspects, yet a decade later her disappearance remains one of Florida's most baffling crimes.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Murder Pact
programme.desc: In Hollywood, FL, the body of a young man is found at the edge of the Everglades. Homicide investigators wade into a sordid tale of bullying, revenge, and secret relationships, in a murder case where no one- not even the victim- is what they seem.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: A God-Fearing Woman
programme.desc: Naomi Huyard never strayed far from home, so her sudden vanishing rocks her tight-knit community to its core. When detectives make an unspeakable discovery, they soon realize there's much more to the story than meets the eye.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Amish Serial Killer
programme.desc: When the body of a 9-year-old boy is found by the side of a rural highway it takes police two years to identify him. The mystery leads police on a chilling odyssey into a secretive community and hot on the trail of an Amish serial killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A housewife in an exclusive neighborhood in Long Beach, California is murdered in broad daylight while cops surround her home. The suspected killer claims it was a burglary gone wrong, but detectives discover something more sinister.

programme.title: Dateline: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A housewife in an exclusive neighborhood in Long Beach, California is murdered in broad daylight while cops surround her home. The suspected killer claims it was a burglary gone wrong, but detectives discover something more sinister.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Prey on Tourists
programme.desc: Patsy Jones was the leader of a band of thieves, targeting tourists leaving the Miami airport by robbing and carjacking them at gunpoint. When she murders one of her targets, Jones hides out in an abandoned apartment.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Dixieland Murders
programme.desc: In 1987, two of Biloxi, Mississippi's most prominent citizens, Judge Vincent Sherry and his wife, Margaret, a city councilwoman, are shot to death in their home. Their oldest daughter sets out on a decade-long quest to find her parents' killer.

programme.title: Killer Carnies: The Sideshow Murders
programme.desc: A brutal murder sent shock waves through the carnival community, and every performer is a suspect. But with the death of Lobster Boy, truths will be revealed, and a reign of terror will meet a shocking end. Life at the carnival will forever change.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Handsome Devil
programme.desc: Kenia Monge spends her week days studying and her weekends partying with friends. When she disappears from a downtown Denver nightclub after a night of drinking and dancing, Kenia wanders the streets without purse or phone and encounters a man with a van.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Leaders
programme.desc: From Winston Churchill and Adolf Hitler, to Mao Tse Tung and Saddam Hussein, experts investigate what makes or breaks a war leader.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Revamp on the Outer Banks
Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Gulf Shores Gut Job

programme.title: Barnwood Builders

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Two Businesses
programme.desc: While Mark Bowe is on the road looking for hand-made crafts to sell in his other store, Sherman leads the crew building a log cabin kitchen near Alexandria. Things get wild as Mark carves a 10,000-year old mammoth tusk for Sherman.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bugs, Birds and Bad Plumbing
programme.desc: Moving to the interior of the Dollar House, host and interior designer Nicole Curtis demolishes her heart out and focuses on the disgusting kitchen space as well as adding a half bathroom to the first floor, evicting a few pigeons along the way.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Rebuild
programme.desc: Heading up to the second floor, Nicole takes on the bathroom, one of the house's dirtiest and grimiest rooms. She brings it down to the studs, adding clean lines with white subway tile and re-purposes an old dresser into one of her signature vanities.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Salvaged Back Yard
programme.desc: Moving back outside, Nicole begins to clean up all the debris from the yard and comes up with a plan to use salvaged materials from the house to create a cute little back yard area.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Breaking the Woodwork Rules
programme.desc: Nicole begins work on the interior of the Case Ave house and is faced with a living and dining room full of gorgeous woodwork and original pocket doors that have been painted over the years.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Breakthrough
programme.desc: The Case Ave house is almost complete, and Nicole has saved the most difficult task for last - figuring out a functional layout for the cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Remade
programme.desc: Nicole tries to figure out a way to incorporate the old kitchen pantry into a new master bathroom and has to deal with outdated and out of order parts.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Back Yard on a Budget
programme.desc: Nicole doesn't have much to work with in the back yard, but she's making the best with what she's got. Lifting up the garage to pour a new foundation beats the cost of building a new one from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Scrap Wood Basement
programme.desc: Nicole takes on a basement restoration in order to help out a sick friend and does her best to use as much scrap wood and materials as she possible can.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Exterior Miracles
programme.desc: Tired of the house being an eyesore in the neighborhood, Nicole must remove all the debris left over from demolishing the burnt out house on the lot next door.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: From Charred to Charming
programme.desc: In the home stretch on her project in Detroit, Nicole must finish up the upper apartment which is the area the fire damaged the most. The community comes together to build an urban garden.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Conn., to conquer land and sea with a totally bonkers, Portuguese-inspired burger and a crazy coastal feast of chowder.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Aporkalypse Now
programme.desc: Noah visits the Great American Foodie Fest in Las Vegas and the Topfield Fair in Massachusetts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Attack of the Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Kentucky State Fair and gets a satisfying taste of all things Southern. He starts off with the Mac Ball Burger featuring deep-fried homemade mac and cheese.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Six Degrees of Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes hog-wild with fantastic porky delights. Pork is as delicious as it is versatile, which allows these amazing carnival cooks to get creative. Whether it's grilled, smoked or even incorporated into dessert, it's time to pig out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Super Sundaes
programme.desc: We all scream for ice cream, but when it comes to super sundaes, these carnival concessionaires have gone one step beyond, and host Noah Cappe is here to try them all!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: By the Sea
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore. Whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson knows that you just can't beat authentic Southern cooking. Whether it's hearty and savory breakfasts, traditional and delicious low-country cuisine or sweet desserts, it’s a full day of your favorite Southern staples.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle
programme.desc: It's that ooey-gooey goodness in the middle that we just can't get enough of, so we're heading straight to the middle of things to see what greatness awaits. Jeff Mauro indulges in a 100-layer vanilla creme doughnut that's full of surprises.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: It's All About Auburn
programme.desc: Rutledge Wood and Damaris Philips visit Auburn, Alabama, known for its cuisine that uses classic Southern ingredients in inventive ways.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Bring It On, Birmingham!
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood are sold on Birmingham, Alabama's, Southern hospitality and amazing eats! At the charming 1950s hot dog shop Gus's Hot Dogs, the duo feasts on a spicy wiener packed with decidedly Southern flavors and spices.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch That Does a Body Good
programme.desc: As a chef constantly surrounded by food, it's important for Bobby to keep healthy options in mind... even when it comes to brunch! Bobby's fitness-minded menu is filled with some of his favourite ingredients.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch Americain
programme.desc: Bobby Flay takes some All-American dishes and gives them a makeover for brunch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Weekend Staycation
programme.desc: A weekend staycation brunch at Chef Bobby Flay's home! Bobby's kitchen is the destination for a cozy menu of crunchy maple topped oatmeal, avocado salmon benedict, cinnamon sugar mini pancake muffins.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocoholic Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is covering the kitchen in chocolate for a luscious menu of sweet and savory treats like dark chocolate waffles with white chocolate custard sauce and espresso-chocolate whipped cream.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Mountains Of Meat
programme.desc: Michael Symon meets a chef bringing the Indian street food flavors of his childhood to Asheville, N.C., with his own take on a sloppy joe that he calls a Sloppy Jai, with lamb hash and 30 Indian spices.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime BBQ
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Smorgasbord For A Shark's Appetite
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon finds a food truck serving up two can't-miss creations: cheeseburger tacos with a house-made beer cheese sauce and a Jamaican jerk fried fish taco with mango salsa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Slammin' Hot and Smoky
programme.desc: In Asheville, N.C., Michael Symon digs into a slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meadowlands State Fair/ Gardendale Magnolia Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples the freak show food of New Jersey and tries southern sweep potato pie ice cream.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California State Fair/ Northeast State Fair
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chows down on a lobster corn dog in California, and tries a deep fried peanut butter and banana sandwich in Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Stanislaus County Fair/ Texas Crab Fest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Stanislaus County Fair in Turlock, California. He gets his paws into homemade fries topped with lobster claws and tail meat, and devours a delicious donut ice cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fusion Fiesta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lifts the lid on the American melting pot to reveal some decadent, delicious results. When fair goers meet fusion foods, the results can only be world domination.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Some Like It Popped
programme.desc: Noah hits the Big Butler Fair in Prospect, PA., where he tears into the Conevore, filled to the brim with smoked brisket, pork and chicken.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Andrew Lessman Your Vitamins

programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a mother who looks like she's been pregnant for 12 years, Dr. Nassif takes on a woman who hasn't been able to close her mouth since college and the doctors meet with a gambler with a serious case of man boobs.

programme.title: Botched: Pinched Perfect

programme.title: Botched: Double D-isaster
programme.desc: Paul helps a female impersonator who isn't comfortable walking the streets without makeup. A woman with 'sideshow boobs' goes under the knife to help her marriage, and the doctors extract silicone star implants from a former body-modification enthusiast.

programme.title: Botched: Supa Fupa
programme.desc: Terry operates on a cancer survivor whose gynecologist did her tummy tuck, Paul performs a reconstructive rhinoplasty on a woman who's been teased about her nose since childhood, and a Brazilian human seeks the doctors' help for botched chest implants.

programme.title: Botched: Plastic Fantastic
programme.desc: After almost dying during a procedure in Ecuador, an ex-Playboy model wants a second chance to fix her neck and nose. Terry tries to help a nurse with one big boob instead of two, and reality star Angelique Morgan wants to be even more plastic.

programme.title: Botched: Seeing Double
programme.desc: A fitness enthusiast and nasal spray addict wants Paul to fix her nose, and a woman with deflated boobs comes to Terry for help. Later, the doctors meet the world's most identical twins.

programme.desc: Kardea Brown's friend from New York City is visiting, so Kardea's whipping up a meal that combines Big Apple classics and the best of the South. Her menu includes seafood pizza with local shrimp, Charleston tea and Big Apple crumb cheesecake.

programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites her fast-food loving friend over for homemade versions with a lighter touch. The menu includes a double patty veggie burger with a special sauce that goes perfectly with oven-baked onion rings and baked apple hand pies for dessert.

programme.desc: Fantasies come true as the best views and food in Alaska are revealed. Diners forget the lower 48 as they feast under the Northern Lights on king crab legs, reindeer ragu, elk meatloaf and salmon burgers.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Brew and Chew
programme.desc: The best bar food at the some of the best small breweries across the country is highlighted. From ale-glazed wings to beer-braised pork shoulder, beer has gone from a frosty sidekick to a key ingredient, and diners are ready to drink it all in.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Chowin' Down the Mississippi River

programme.desc: Hidden deep in the wilderness of Alaska is the toughest town in America: McCarthy. Locked in winter's grip, the 42 souls who are brave enough to live here must battle the elements, and each other, to maintain their pioneer way of life.

programme.title: Edge of Alaska: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The last days of winter bring change. The future of town lies in the balance. Jason races the melting river crossings to reach his crashed airplane. Jeremy tests his nine-year-old son with a risky solo dog sled run through the woods.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Sock Puppies
programme.desc: In a pack of nine Spinone Italianos, there's only one thing that keeps a timid pup named Wally calm: his security sock. While a few miles away, a mischievous Pug named Oskar is a constant handful for his orderly librarian mom.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Puppies and Prickles
programme.desc: In the countryside, a German Shepherd mom is training her troop of seven pups to be Search and Rescue dogs. While in the big city an African Pygmy Hedgehog named Prickle is looking for a soft and cuddly companion in a house full of Havanese puppies.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Multi-Million Dollar Nightmare
programme.desc: A couple just moved into their multi-million dollar dream home, but their cat is turning their dream into a nightmare. A couple adopted Dyna so their cat Sugar would have a friend, but instead she ended up with an enemy.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodile Hunter's Wildest Home Videos
programme.desc: Steve and Terri get snapped at by crocs, bitten by snakes and chased by various furry things in this romp through the best of the video archives of the Australia Zoo.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Mate for Life
programme.desc: The health and love life of Chester's Penguin Island's oldest penguin could be in jeopardy. One of the zoo's most dangerous families is on the move and keepers prepare to welcome two orphan sun bears to the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Canopy Clubhouse
programme.desc: With a budget as high as the trees, a family in Bedford, NY hires Pete to design a dream clubhouse for the entire family. With a big BBQ patio, a living room and a lofted chalkboard covered playroom, Pete's surprise treehouse brings fun for all ages.

programme.title: Tanked!: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are back home in New York visiting a long time client to go over the install of a shark tank for his newly constructed orthodontist office.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Ghost Dog
programme.desc: A pit bull is saved from drowning by a little girl and needs Tia's help. Also, 20 new puppies are brought to Villalobos and Tia needs to hire another parolee.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Gift from Heaven
programme.desc: A request for help turns tragic when Tia and her daughter Mariah reach out to help a man care for two rescue dogs.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Run and You're Done

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Climb-in Drive-In

Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Horrible Hoarder House
programme.desc: Alison and Mondo are amateur flippers who have not only taken on the worst house on the block, but the worst house Tarek has ever seen.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: The Craziest Ceiling in Compton
programme.desc: A couple that flipped a home with Tarek in the past must call on him again after buying a home with stalactites on the ceilings and competition nearby. When Tarek learns they didn't call the city about permits, he doubts whether the project can be saved.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: A couple buys a small home in Sylmar, CA, in hopes of finishing quickly and turning a modest profit. On top of a cracked foundation and failing retaining wall, he's willing to take risks that she is not, so Tarek steps in to get them through the project.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Style vs. Substance
programme.desc: A couple takes on a flip in pricey Pasadena, CA, and battles between what looks good and what's affordable. Tarek steps in to get them on the same page before project delays, a challenging lot and unforeseen problems turn their flip into a nightmare.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Bad Energy BoHo
programme.desc: Tarek mentors real estate novices to help them learn the secrets of a successful flip.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Broken Slab to Totally Fab
programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Baptism By Fire
programme.desc: Audrey and son Anthony are taking on their first flip together in Woodland Hills. When a devastating fire rips through the house halfway through the project, it threatens to burn up their potential profit as well.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Flipping Family Nightmare
programme.desc: Junes and his mom share a dream of building a family flipping business, but this flip in Long Beach is quickly becoming a nightmare. Blaming each other for mistakes and losing money, they disagree on who should be doing what.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail
programme.desc: Lidia and Fernando are putting all their savings on the line to flip their first home in Rancho Cucamonga. She's a dreamer obsessed with expensive design. He is so neurotic about losing money, he's trying to skimp everywhere he can.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Small House, Great Neighborhood

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The I-40 Killer
programme.desc: A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware. But when investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: Rifkin on Rifkin: Private Confessions of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Through newly revealed interviews from Attica Correctional Facility, New York's most prolific serial killer, Joel Rifkin, reveals exclusive insights into the mind of a monster.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The I-40 Killer
programme.desc: A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware. But when investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: Snapped: Susan Monica
programme.desc: While investigating a missing Oregon handyman, police stumble upon human remains and are left searching a stunning crime scene straight out of a horror movie.

programme.title: Catching a Serial Killer: Bruce McArthur
programme.desc: Bruce McArthur was many things; friend, grandfather, mall Santa, landscaper, and a ruthless serial killer who buried body parts in the yards of his posh clientele. This is the true story of the race to catch Toronto's most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: In the Dark
programme.desc: Several homeless men who disappear are linked to an auto parts dealer with a secret.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Magnificat
programme.desc: Detectives Goren and Eames contemplate a car bomb blast that killed three boys and injured their mother and brother. As they probe the case, they discover connections to the mother's earlier postpartum depression and questionable behaviour by the father.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Silver Lining
programme.desc: The Major Case squad discovers a long line of burglaries attributed to their suspect.

programme.title: The DNA of Murder With Paul Holes: Killer Connection
programme.desc: In 2002, 27 year old, Tamekia Taylor, was murdered in her home as she dressed for a holiday party. Her crime scene resembles another Atlanta murder victim, Jennifer Clemmings, killed less than 2 months later. Paul Holes and Loni Coombs investigate.

programme.title: Manson: The Women
programme.desc: 50 years after the infamous Manson Family murders, we follow the trail of the women who blindly followed Charles Manson including new and exclusive interviews.

programme.title: Method of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When Israel Keyes is caught for the murder of 18-year-old Samantha Koenig, police have no clue what they've stumbled upon. After intense games of cat and mouse, the FBI uncovers one of the most calculated serial killers they've ever encountered.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: License to Kill: International Serial Killer
programme.desc: A doctor has an unnatural obsession with death. When the FBI gets involved after a string of mysterious deaths, they discover a 20-year-long trail of destruction that leads them on an international hunt to stop a sadistic madman.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Charles Cullen
programme.desc: Nurse Charles Cullen is one of America's most prolific serial killers. Police say he may have murdered up to 400 victims, Cullen claimed he acted mercifully to end their pain. An in-depth look into the case reveals the truth behind his motives.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Kristen Gilbert
programme.desc: Police believe nurse Kristen Gilbert may have committed up to 60 murders at a hospital in Massachusetts. Some say an affair drove Gilbert to murder while others think her narcissism caused the death of these innocent patients.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Collar and Leash Killer
programme.desc: A string of women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash. Detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Movie: The Predator
programme.desc: A curious young boy accidentally triggers the return of the galaxy's deadliest hunters to Earth. The genetically upgraded Predators are stinger, faster and more dangerous than before, and it's up to small group of ex-soldiers to stop the invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Vegetarian
programme.desc: A trip to a local tourist attraction leads to confrontations when Lisa decides to become a vegetarian. She becomes angry when she finds little support from everyone else, causing her to ruin Homer's barbecue.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror VI
programme.desc: Giant billboard characters come to life during an unusual weather storm. Groundskeeper Willy's dying curse is to vow revenge on Springfield's kids by haunting their dreams. Homer discovers a 3D dimension.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mother Simpson
programme.desc: After faking his own death, Homer discovers that his mother is alive. He brings her home to meet the family and learns that she is on the run from the law. Her old nemesis, Mr. Burns, alerts the cops to her whereabouts, forcing her to leave once again.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sideshow Bob's Last Gleaming
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob escapes from prison, steals a bomb and hides out in a blimp. When he threatens to detonate a bomb, the town gives in to his only demand and ceases production of all television shows.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons 138th Episode Spectacular
programme.desc: Troy McClure hosts this look back at The Simpsons' first eight seasons, featuring vintage clips, outtakes and highlights of the previous episodes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Be Not Proud
programme.desc: Bart is caught stealing a video game at a local store and desperately tries to hide this from his parents. When a family portrait is ruined as a result, Marge decides that it is her fault for mothering him too much.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Team Homer
programme.desc: Mr. Burns decides to join Homer's bowling team after becoming the sponsor. Bart's shirt leads to the implementation of uniforms at school, causing a loss of individuality and creativity.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Two Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Homer's garage sale is upstaged by George Bush, who is moving in across the street. When Bart receives a spanking, Homer starts a prank war that escalates into a one-on-one confrontation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Scenes From a Class Struggle in Springfield
programme.desc: While wearing an expensive suit found at an outlet mall, Marge meets a former schoolmate who invites her and the family to the country club. Marge soon becomes obsessed with trying to fit in with high society, while Homer takes up golf.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Smithers
programme.desc: When Smithers takes a much-needed vacation, Homer is hired as a temporary replacement. After Homer loses his temper, Mr. Burns tackles some of the basic tasks himself and his newfound independence leaves Smithers jobless.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Violence Died
programme.desc: Bart helps a homeless man prove he was the rightful creator of Itchy and Scratchy. But when the man is awarded damages in court, the Itchy and Scratchy studios have to close for good.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Fish Called Selma
programme.desc: Actor Troy McClure takes Selma out on a date in return for passing his eye test at the DMV. His sagging career is suddenly given a boost when he is seen in public with Selma, leading to marriage for both.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets Whacked
programme.desc: The gang is in trouble with the mob after Charlie and Dee find cocaine that belongs to them.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets Whacked
programme.desc: Father Mara sells drugs and Dennis becomes a gigolo as a means to pay back the mob.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Bums: Making a Mess All Over the City
programme.desc: Mac and Dee do their part to try to keep the streets clean. Dennis and Frank pretend to be police officers and do not follow the rules.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Dances Their Asses Off
programme.desc: The gang competes in a dance-off, after Charlie unintentionally puts up the bar as a prize.
